entries.question: cadence cycle は何を実行したか
entries.answer: Cadence surfaces are fresh enough; no self-start is required right now.
entries.expectation_state: cadence cycle can now defer cadence work when the runtime says it is not due
entries.scale_direction: keep checking timing until cadence becomes due-now

entries.question: external cadence scheduler は次に何をすべきか
entries.expectation_state: cadence scheduling can now defer external polling until the next due window
entries.scale_direction: keep the external scheduler aligned with the recommended next check window

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: cadence still needs a concrete external scheduler integration or a deeper self-start automation policy
entries.expectation_state: cadence scheduling is now machine-readable for an external scheduler through cadence-schedule
entries.mismatch_state: cadence still needs a concrete external scheduler integration or a deeper self-start automation policy
entries.scale_direction: formalize external scheduler integration around cadence-cycle now that scheduling guidance is runtime-backed
